name: 10 GM Lipid Based Tacrolimus Ointment  0.1% W-W
about: Our 10 GM Lipid Based Tacrolimus Ointment 0.1% W-W is an effective solution for various skin conditions. This cream is specially designed to provide relief from eczema, psoriasis, and other skin inflammations. The ointment is formulated with a lipid base that helps to moisturize the skin and prevent dryness. It contains tacrolimus, which is an immunosuppressant that works by reducing inflammation and itching. This cream is easy to use and suitable for all skin types. It is white in color and should be stored in a dry place.

faq.q: What is the use of this cream?
faq.a: This cream is used to provide relief from eczema, psoriasis, and other skin inflammations.

faq.q: What is the main ingredient in this cream?
faq.a: The main ingredient in this cream is tacrolimus.

faq.q: Is this cream suitable for all skin types?
faq.a: Yes, this cream is suitable for all skin types.

faq.q: What is the color of this cream?
faq.a: This cream is white in color.

faq.q: How should I store this cream?
faq.a: This cream should be stored in a dry place.
